note: Consolidated poster-generation specs from the codex asset packets. Generation is BLOCKED in this environment (no image-gen API key). With OPENAI_API_KEY set, run codex/tools/generate-posters.mjs to produce out/<poster_id>.png, then attach each to its object's assets[] (kind:poster).
